# A-share intake ready fixture

This fixture is not real market data and must not be copied into
`Z:\asteria-trading-labs-data` as evidence.

It exists only to verify the local MALF/Tachibana intake contract:

- a complete intake package can pass machine validation;
- the candidate can advance only to `structure_candidate`;
- `tachibana_applicability` remains `unknown`;
- the next permitted action is `action:run_front_filter`.
